note: TOKEN_TTL_SECONDS was previously hardcoded — env var not picked up in test env, caused sessions to expire immediately
author: neelabhs07@gmail.com

note: PaymentService.charge validates token before amount — deliberate: reject unauthenticated requests before running business logic
author: neelabhs07@gmail.com

note: Tried using float rounding at charge site but it broke currency edge cases — use Decimal at the model boundary instead, see PR discussion
author: neelabhs07@gmail.com

note: frontend/ owned by UI team, ping before changing API_BASE or API_TIMEOUT_MS defaults
author: neelabhs07@gmail.com

note: auth module uses HS256 JWT signing — token TTL is env-configurable via TOKEN_TTL_SECONDS
billing feature is not yet PCI-scoped — payment data goes via third-party SDK, no card data stored locally
How to add a new API endpoint in this repo
steps: Run: scope report to check token savings are tracking

note: How to add a new API endpoint in this repo
steps: Add route decorator to the controller file (Flask @router.post or Spring @PostMapping)
Run: scope update --files <changed-file> to refresh index
Run: scope tests --file <new-file> to verify test linkage
Run: scope touchpoints to confirm route appears in index
Run: scope report to check token savings are tracking
